---
title: "My Travels"
---
```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>

<div style="max-width:960px; margin:0 auto; padding:40px 20px; text-align:center; font-family:'Georgia',serif;">
  <p style="font-size:1.1rem; letter-spacing:0.25em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#9b8877; margin-bottom:6px;">My Travels</p>
  <h2 style="font-size:2rem; font-style:italic; color:#3a3a3a; margin-bottom:30px;">Places I've Been</h2>

  <div id="travel-map" style="width:100%; height:480px; border-radius:8px; box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);"></div>

  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:22px;">
    <div class="tmap-btn" data-region="europe" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      🌍 Europe
    </div>
    <div class="tmap-btn" data-region="east-asia" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      🌏 East Asia
    </div>
    <div class="tmap-btn" data-region="australia" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#c9aa96;border:1.5px solid #c9aa96;border-radius:20px;padding:8px 20px;font-size:0.82rem;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;">
      🦘 Australia
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  .leaflet-popup-content-wrapper { border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Georgia', serif; }
  .tmap-btn { transition: all 0.2s ease; }
  .tmap-btn:hover { opacity: 0.8; transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .tmap-btn.active { background: #a07860 !important; border-color: #a07860 !important; }
</style>

<script>
(function() {
  var tmap = L.map('travel-map', {
    center: [30, 20], zoom: 2, minZoom: 2, maxZoom: 10,
    scrollWheelZoom: true, zoomControl: true,
    maxBounds: [[-75, -180], [90, 180]],
    maxBoundsViscosity: 1.0
  });

  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_nolabels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
    attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://carto.com/">CARTO</a>',
    subdomains: 'abcd', maxZoom: 19
  }).addTo(tmap);

  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_only_labels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
    subdomains: 'abcd', maxZoom: 19, opacity: 0.6
  }).addTo(tmap);

  var regionViews = {
    'europe':    { center: [50, 15],  zoom: 4 },
    'east-asia': { center: [36, 127], zoom: 4 },
    'australia': { center: [-27, 133], zoom: 4 }
  };

  var places = [
    // Europe
    { name: 'Edinburgh',   latlng: [55.95, -3.19],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'London',      latlng: [51.51, -0.13],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Amsterdam',   latlng: [52.37, 4.90],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Cologne',     latlng: [50.94, 6.96],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Paris',       latlng: [48.85, 2.35],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Dubrovnik',   latlng: [42.65, 18.09],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Budva',       latlng: [42.28, 18.84],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Switzerland', latlng: [46.82, 8.23],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Liechtenstein', latlng: [47.14, 9.52],  region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Vienna',      latlng: [48.21, 16.37],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Bratislava',  latlng: [48.15, 17.11],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Budapest',    latlng: [47.50, 19.04],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Manchester',  latlng: [53.48, -2.24],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Liverpool',   latlng: [53.41, -2.98],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Madrid',      latlng: [40.42, -3.70],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Venice',      latlng: [45.44, 12.33],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Split',       latlng: [43.51, 16.44],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Faro',        latlng: [37.02, -7.93],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Lagos',       latlng: [37.10, -8.67],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Cadiz',       latlng: [36.53, -6.30],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Gibraltar',   latlng: [36.14, -5.35],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Malaga',      latlng: [36.72, -4.42],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Granada',     latlng: [37.18, -3.60],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Rome',        latlng: [41.90, 12.50],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Madeira',     latlng: [32.76, -16.96],  region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Milan',       latlng: [45.46, 9.19],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Como',        latlng: [45.81, 9.09],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Genoa',       latlng: [44.41, 8.93],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Monaco',      latlng: [43.74, 7.43],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Cannes',      latlng: [43.55, 7.02],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Nice',        latlng: [43.71, 7.26],    region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Lithuania',   latlng: [55.17, 23.88],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Wexford',     latlng: [52.34, -6.46],   region: 'europe' },
    { name: 'Fermanagh',   latlng: [54.35, -7.63],   region: 'europe' },

    // East Asia
    { name: 'Tokyo',       latlng: [35.68, 139.69],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Kyoto',       latlng: [35.01, 135.77],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Osaka',       latlng: [34.69, 135.50],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Nara',        latlng: [34.69, 135.83],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Kobe',        latlng: [34.69, 135.19],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Himeji',      latlng: [34.84, 134.69],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Arashiyama',  latlng: [35.01, 135.67],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Hiroshima',   latlng: [34.39, 132.45],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Fukuoka',     latlng: [33.59, 130.40],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Nagasaki',    latlng: [32.75, 129.88],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Nagoya',      latlng: [35.18, 136.91],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Sapporo',     latlng: [43.06, 141.35],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Okinawa',     latlng: [26.33, 127.80],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Oita',        latlng: [33.23, 131.61],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Beppu',       latlng: [33.28, 131.50],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Kumamoto',    latlng: [32.80, 130.70],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Kagoshima',   latlng: [31.60, 130.56],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Miyazaki',    latlng: [31.91, 131.42],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Matsue',      latlng: [35.47, 133.06],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Izumo',       latlng: [35.37, 132.76],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Matsumoto',   latlng: [36.24, 137.97],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Kanazawa',    latlng: [36.56, 136.66],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Shizuoka',    latlng: [34.98, 138.38],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Mount Fuji',  latlng: [35.36, 138.73],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Suzuka',      latlng: [34.84, 136.54],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Wakayama',    latlng: [34.23, 135.17],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Tokushima',   latlng: [34.07, 134.56],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Tottori',     latlng: [35.50, 134.24],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Minoh',       latlng: [34.83, 135.47],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Hikone',      latlng: [35.27, 136.26],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Naruto',      latlng: [34.18, 134.61],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Seoul',       latlng: [37.57, 126.98],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Busan',       latlng: [35.10, 129.04],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Gyeongju',    latlng: [35.86, 129.22],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Taipei',      latlng: [25.03, 121.56],  region: 'east-asia' },
    { name: 'Hanoi',       latlng: [21.03, 105.85],  region: 'east-asia' },

    // Australia
    { name: 'Sydney',      latlng: [-33.87, 151.21], region: 'australia' },
    { name: 'Perth',       latlng: [-31.95, 115.86], region: 'australia' },
    { name: 'Busselton',   latlng: [-33.65, 115.35], region: 'australia' },
  ];

  var dotIcon = L.divIcon({
    className: '',
    html: '<div style="width:10px;height:10px;background:#c9aa96;border:2px solid #fff;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);"></div>',
    iconSize: [10, 10], iconAnchor: [5, 5], popupAnchor: [0, -8]
  });

  places.forEach(function(p) {
    L.marker(p.latlng, { icon: dotIcon })
      .addTo(tmap)
      .bindPopup(
        '<div style="text-align:center;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-style:italic;color:#3a3a3a;font-size:1rem;">' + p.name + '</div>',
        { maxWidth: 160 }
      );
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.tmap-btn').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
      document.querySelectorAll('.tmap-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
      this.classList.add('active');
      var v = regionViews[this.getAttribute('data-region')];
      tmap.flyTo(v.center, v.zoom, { duration: 1.2 });
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
